name: Wei Chong
page_title: Wei Zhong 魏種 [Wei, Zhang Miao, Sui Gu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Cao Cao believed he would be loyal but he defected, later sent to defend against Yuan Shao.

sections.biography-source-undefined:
Cao Cao once nominated Wei Zhong as Filial and Incorrupt. When Yan Province revolted, Cao Cao said, “Only Wei Zhong will never betray me.” However, Wei Zhong fled the province and abandoned Cao Cao. When Cao Cao heard about this, he furiously said, "[Wei] Zhong, should you not flee south to the Yue or flee north to the Hu, I shall never appoint you!”

Wei Zhong wound up in Shequan City, and when it fell to Cao Cao and his forces, Wei Zhong was captured alive. Cao Cao spared him, loosened his binds, and appointed him as Grand Administrator of Henei Commandery, saying, “This was only because of his talent!” He was entrusted with whatever happened in the Hebei Region.

full_text:
Wei Zhong 魏種
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Zhong (魏種). Cao Cao believed he would be loyal but he defected, later sent to defend against Yuan Shao. Wei Zhong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom, Zhang Miao, and Sui Gu.

Cao Cao once nominated Wei Zhong as Filial and Incorrupt. When Yan Province revolted, Cao Cao said, “Only Wei Zhong will never betray me.” However, Wei Zhong fled the province and abandoned Cao Cao. When Cao Cao heard about this, he furiously said, "[Wei] Zhong, should you not flee south to the Yue or flee north to the Hu, I shall never appoint you!”
Wei Zhong wound up in Shequan City, and when it fell to Cao Cao and his forces, Wei Zhong was captured alive. Cao Cao spared him, loosened his binds, and appointed him as Grand Administrator of Henei Commandery, saying, “This was only because of his talent!” He was entrusted with whatever happened in the Hebei Region.
